footer.tagline: Footwear for the ones who run first. Built in Kyoto, run everywhere.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Katooni Athletic Co. All rights reserved.

hero.sub: Carbon-plated, volt-soled, and built for the long mile. Engineered in Kyoto. Tested on the first cold morning of the year.

featured.body: Available in three colorways. Limited first run of 1,200 pairs. Each pair is individually numbered on the medial heel.

editorial.step1Title: An upper that disappears on the foot.
editorial.step1Body: Single-piece engineered knit, knit-in gusset, zero overlays at the midfoot. The foot is the only thing inside the shoe.
editorial.step2Body: Two-density supercritical foam, 38 mm heel, 34 mm forefoot, 4 mm drop. Tuned to return the energy you put in, with a quietness underfoot that hides the work.
editorial.step3Title: Volt rubber, lugged where it counts.
editorial.step3Body: Our own volt rubber compound, lugged for pavement and packed dirt. Coverage maps to where the foot actually loads, not where the camera looks.

pillars.title: Four ideas. We hold them on purpose.
pillars.p1Body: Every upper is pulled over a last in our Kyoto workshop. Eight minutes per pair, by the same hand each time.
pillars.p2Body: Pavement, packed dirt, indoor court. We change the lug. We do not change the shoe.
pillars.p3Body: Midfoot strike for most of us. We bias the geometry there and let the rest of the foot do what it does.
pillars.p4Body: When the rubber goes, the upper does not. Send the pair back and we re-lace the outsole in fourteen days.

preview.title: Twelve pairs. Each one earned its place.

store.title: The full catalog
store.empty: Nothing in the catalog fits that.
store.emptyBody: Try removing a filter, or take a look at the full set of pairs.

notFound.title: This page is between kilometers.
notFound.body: The link you followed has been moved or never existed. Head back to the front door and we will point you somewhere useful.
